scripts.build:flowbite: pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-demo-common build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-flowbite build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-flowbite-extended build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-flowbite-webcomponent build && pnpm --filter jsonforms-svelte-flowbite-demo build
scripts.build:skeleton: pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-demo-common build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-skeleton build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-skeleton-extended build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-skeleton-webcomponent build && pnpm --filter jsonforms-svelte-skeleton-demo build
scripts.build:libs: pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-demo-common build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-flowbite build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-skeleton build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-flowbite-extended build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-skeleton-extended build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-flowbite-webcomponent build && pnpm --filter @chobantonov/jsonforms-svelte-skeleton-webcomponent build
scripts.build:demo: pnpm run build:libs && pnpm --filter jsonforms-svelte-flowbite-demo build && pnpm --filter jsonforms-svelte-skeleton-demo build
scripts.build:pages: pnpm run build:demo && pnpm --filter jsonforms-svelte-pages-shell build
